title: Geopolitical developments contributed to significant market moves
section_path: Geopolitical developments contributed to significant market moves
section_path_text: Geopolitical developments contributed to significant market moves
summary:
Main
Developments in the Middle East contributed to some significant swings in the commodity markets during yesterday's trading activities. On the other hand, weak demand weighed on most dry bulk vessel segments, contributing to a second day of losses for the Baltic Dry Index. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
Geopolitical developments dominated yesterday's news flow and contributed to significant market moves.
